text: This is a non-unitized guaranteed fund.
這是非單位化的保證基金。
This is a weekly dealing fund, the price shown is as of the last dealing day of the month which may not be the date shown in the heading.
這是每週交易的基金，所載價格為該月份最後交易日的價格，這可能並非標題所示的日期。
Newspapers in which unit prices are regularly published:
單位價格慣常載於以下報紙:
Deduction of fees from members' account by way of unit deduction in MPF Conservative Funds:
透過扣除成員帳戶中的單位收費的強積金保守基金：
Fees and charges of MPF Conservative Funds can be deducted from either (i) the assets of the fund or (ii) members' account by way of unit deduction.

This fund uses method (ii) and, therefore, unit prices / NAV / fund performance quoted (except for the fund performance figures quoted in a fund fact sheet) do not reflect the impact of fees and charges.
強積金保守基金的收費可 (一) 透過扣除資產淨值收取；或 (二) 透過扣除成員帳戶中的單位收取。
本基金採用方式 (二) 收費，故所列之單位價格 / 資產淨值 / 基金表現 (基金便覽所列的基金表現數字除外) 並未反映收費之影響。
